title: Only About One In Five Global Workers Feel Their Jobs Are Safe as AI Anxiety Grows: Poll
description: A growing majority of workers around the world are worried about their job security because of the rise of artificial intelligence.
content:

title: Forget chatbots, Mukesh Ambani wants to own India's entire AI economy
description: Reliance Industries is set to transform artificial intelligence access in India. The company plans to build a sovereign AI backbone and offer AI services across various sectors. This initiative aims to make AI affordable and widely available to all Indians. Reliance is focusing on infrastructure and distribution, much like its successful Jio telecom venture.
